targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_portfolio), prev AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT d FROM latest)) SELECT (SELECT goal_progress_pct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest)) - (SELECT goal_progress_pct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM prev)) AS value

targets.queryText: WITH d AS (SELECT as_of_date_local, market_value - LAG(market_value) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS MVDelta, projected_monthly_income - LAG(projected_monthly_income) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS IncomeDelta FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-60 day')) SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, MVDelta, IncomeDelta FROM d WHERE MVDelta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: WITH d AS (SELECT as_of_date_local, market_value - LAG(market_value) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS MVDelta, projected_monthly_income - LAG(projected_monthly_income) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS IncomeDelta FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-60 day')) SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, MVDelta, IncomeDelta FROM d WHERE MVDelta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: WITH d AS (SELECT as_of_date_local, forward_12m_total - LAG(forward_12m_total) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS F12Delta, ltv_pct - LAG(ltv_pct) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS LTVDelta, goal_progress_pct - LAG(goal_progress_pct) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS GoalDelta FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-60 day')) SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, F12Delta, LTVDelta, GoalDelta FROM d WHERE F12Delta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: WITH d AS (SELECT as_of_date_local, forward_12m_total - LAG(forward_12m_total) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS F12Delta, ltv_pct - LAG(ltv_pct) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS LTVDelta, goal_progress_pct - LAG(goal_progress_pct) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_date_local) AS GoalDelta FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-60 day')) SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, F12Delta, LTVDelta, GoalDelta FROM d WHERE F12Delta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: WITH latest_date AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_holdings), prev_date AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT d FROM latest_date)), cur AS (SELECT symbol, market_value, projected_monthly_dividend, twr_1m_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest_date)), prev AS (SELECT symbol, market_value, projected_monthly_dividend, twr_1m_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM prev_date)), j AS (SELECT c.symbol, c.market_value - p.market_value AS mv_delta, c.projected_monthly_dividend - p.projected_monthly_dividend AS inc_delta, c.twr_1m_pct - p.twr_1m_pct AS risk_delta FROM cur c JOIN prev p ON p.symbol=c.symbol) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(mv_delta,2) AS MVDelta, round(inc_delta,2) AS IncDelta, round(risk_delta,3) AS RiskDelta FROM j ORDER BY abs(mv_delta) DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_date AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_holdings), prev_date AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT d FROM latest_date)), cur AS (SELECT symbol, market_value, projected_monthly_dividend, twr_1m_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest_date)), prev AS (SELECT symbol, market_value, projected_monthly_dividend, twr_1m_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM prev_date)), j AS (SELECT c.symbol, c.market_value - p.market_value AS mv_delta, c.projected_monthly_dividend - p.projected_monthly_dividend AS inc_delta, c.twr_1m_pct - p.twr_1m_pct AS risk_delta FROM cur c JOIN prev p ON p.symbol=c.symbol) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(mv_delta,2) AS MVDelta, round(inc_delta,2) AS IncDelta, round(risk_delta,3) AS RiskDelta FROM j ORDER BY abs(mv_delta) DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT substr(category,1,12) AS Cat, severity AS Sev, status AS Status, substr(title,1,22) AS Title FROM alert_messages ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC, severity DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(category,1,12) AS Cat, severity AS Sev, status AS Status, substr(title,1,22) AS Title FROM alert_messages ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC, severity DESC LIMIT 5

title: D02 LMI v4 - Diff Daily
description: Daily delta board: latest day-over-day shifts across value, income, risk, goals, and holding drivers.
